LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER THE FOCAL POINT LLC'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND CONFIRM AMENDED AWARD, OR ISSUE AMENDED JUDGMENT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, NOT REPORTED.
